description: You are a Compliance Manager at Meridian Workspace Solutions preparing for an ISO 9001 surveillance audit. To remediate a critical accountability gap, create a quality alert team named 'ISO Surveillance Response Team' and assign all quality alerts currently in the 'New' stage to this team. Additionally, any 'New' stage alerts with titles describing structural failures, hardware problems, or material cracking must be escalated to 'Urgent' priority per the company's risk classification procedure. Log in to the quality management system at http://localhost:8069 with username admin and password admin.
